message:
fix(swarm,safety): harden temp file cleanup and cap query/TTL bounds

- swarm.go: best-effort os.Remove of .tmp file on WriteFile or Rename
  failure, preventing stale temp files from accumulating
- safety.go: cap `hours` query param at 720 (30 days) and `limit` at
  10000 in handleSafetyBlockedV1 to prevent unbounded queries
- safety.go: propagate policy.LoadOrDefault errors instead of silently
  discarding them in handleApprovalRequestV1
- safety.go: cap approval TTL at 86400s (24h) to prevent unbounded
  memory growth from long-lived approval entries

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
